news.title: Sunforge Outlaw Issue 2 arrives May 20
news.excerpt: Issue 2 of Sunforge Outlaw lands May 20 with a longer chase sequence and expanded world notes.
news.body: Sunforge Outlaw Issue 2 is set for release on May 20. This issue widens the frontier map, adds new faction pressure, and pushes Marrow and Lio into a tighter debt spiral. We also tuned panel pacing to improve momentum through the midpoint action stretch.
news.imageAlt: Sunforge Outlaw key art with heated frontier skyline

news.title: Stardust Station layout pass complete
news.excerpt: The team completed a full layout and lettering pass for the next Stardust Station batch.
news.body: We wrapped a full layout and lettering pass for upcoming Stardust Station pages this week. The pass focused on readability in dense multi-character scenes and cleaner visual hierarchy for station UI moments. Color planning starts next.
